title: desmodium laxiflorum subsp. lacei
intro: Desmodium laxiflorum subsp. lacei, commonly known as Lace's tick trefoil, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Desmodium laxiflorum subsp. lacei include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
